meta.title: 6 game-changing new weapons in the works for the US Air Force
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

While the past three-plus years of fighting in Ukraine have brought small, quadcopter drones to the forefront of discussions about modern warfare, Israel’s recent 12-day offensive into Iran served as a powerful reminder that there’s still no replacement for overwhelming air superiority delivered via crewed aircraft. 

So, let's talk about the new weapons that'll be arming them for the U.S. Air Force in the near future.
